title: Export an office duty + compliance handbook (CC-BY)
context: The duty/compliance content in the tool -- once expert-signed-off -- is valuable as a standalone reference document that an office can print, share, or distribute. An export feature generates a structured handbook (duties, ethics/compliance rules, records obligations) from the cited content, licensed CC-BY-4.0. Because this is derived from HIGH-tier legal/ethics content, it requires the same expert sign-off as the underlying content and may not ship without it.
objective: Implement an export feature that generates a printable/shareable office duty + compliance handbook from the expert-signed-off cited content, licensed CC-BY-4.0, with attribution to primary sources preserved -- requiring the same expert sign-off as the underlying content.
acceptanceCriteria: Generates a structured handbook covering duties, oath/powers, ethics/compliance rules, and records obligations for the pilot jurisdiction
All content cited to primary sources; attribution preserved per CC-BY-4.0
Export is derived only from expert-signed-off content versions; may not include any content without recorded sign-off
Output labeled informational not legal advice; routes to counsel/ethics board for binding determinations
Expert (ethics/legal) sign-off on the exported handbook before it is made available
Output in a portable format (PDF and/or Markdown)
output: A feature that exports an office duty + compliance handbook from the expert-signed-off cited content, in PDF/Markdown, CC-BY-4.0, with expert sign-off recorded.
